Name: Comprehension Accumulator
Description: Collects mapped records into a comprehension object keyed by GUID. Accumulates until finalized.

EventInputs.Name: AddRecord
EventInputs.Description: Add a mapped record to the comprehension

EventInputs.Name: Finalize
EventInputs.Description: All records added; emit the completed comprehension

SettingsInputs.Name: Entity
SettingsInputs.Description: Entity name for the comprehension key

SettingsInputs.Name: GUIDField
SettingsInputs.Description: Field name used as the unique key (e.g. GUIDMappedBook)
